texto: My father was an urchin that lived in Hell's Kitchen. He was part of a family of nine. And both he and I became truck drivers for different companies.

texto: Liquid architecture. It's like jazz - you improvise, you work together, you play off each other, you make something, they make something. And I think it's a way of - for me, it's a way of trying to understand the city, and what might happen in the city.
